creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 148590
patch for updating port

- update 1.10 -> 1.14

Tested with poudriere (logs attached) at:
- 10.0-amd64
- 9.3-amd64
- 8.4-amd64
During this testing, built-in tests were activated with

pre-install:	test

construct in the port's Makefile.

Tested with portlint -AC. Just warns as:
	unknown pkg-plist directive "@dir ..."
